source_pr.title: stats: fix pseudo selectivity for primary key
source_pr.body:
When estimating the pseudo selectivity for primary key equal conditions, it should not exceed `1/row count`.
PTAL @coocood @winoros @zz-jason

symptoms: sql: "select c from t where t.c = 1 and t.a > 1 order by t.d limit 1", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select c from t where t.c = 1 and t.a > 1 order by t.d limit 1", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)

fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
